courses.body: Check if your baby shows any of these signs: - Startles excessively at sounds, movement, or sudden changes - Screams through tummy time or arches their back in resistance - Head still feels floppy beyond the expected milestone age - Stiffens or arches when picked up or held in certain positions - Struggles to settle — overtired but can't switch off - Wakes frequently at night for no obvious reason - Feeds with difficulty — latching problems, excessive wind, or reflux - Clenches fists constantly beyond 3-4 months - Startles themselves awake during sleep repeatedly - Seems hypersensitive to touch, light, or sound - Misses milestones — rolling, sitting, or crawling later than expected - Tummy always seems uncomfortable — gas, colic, or constipation - Neck tilts to one side or consistently turns the same direction These are rarely "just colic," "just a phase," or "just their personality." They usually mean your baby's primitive reflexes are stuck — keeping their nervous system in survival mode instead of developing the way it should. ### Why Most Approaches Don't Work Most therapies are too expensive, too clinical, and too slow. Most parenting advice tells you to "wait and see" or "every baby is different" — but you can't wait your way through a stuck reflex. Babies need the right input — specific, gentle, repeated touch — until their brain and body finally integrate the way they should. Baby Neuro Reflex delivers exactly that, in a format babies respond to from the very first session. ### Baby Neuro Reflex Makes It Easy to Practice Every Day In just 10 minutes a day, you'll: - Use simple, guided touch techniques your baby naturally responds to - Build the neurological patterns your baby needs for calm, development, and growth See progress as daily practice helps your baby: - Startle less and settle faster after noise or movement - Sleep longer and wake less frequently through the night - Hit milestones — rolling, sitting, crawling — at the right time - Ease through tum

courses.title: Intuitive Indigo: A Ritual Journey with the Indigo Plant
courses.author: Babs Behan
courses.excerpt: In this online course, Babs Behan, natural dyer (Botanical Inks) and intuitive indigo guide, shares a unique indigo dye practice that combines practical vat-making with somatic awareness, embodied ritual, and deep plant connection, allowing you to create meaningful ceremonial textiles and garments t
courses.body: In this course, participants will learn the essential skills of working with indigo through a combination of practical instruction and embodied ritual practice. They will explore how to prepare and use an indigo vat, how to dye cloth with care and awareness, and how to engage with indigo through somatic presence, tea ritual, and plant connection. As a result of the course, participants will be able to: - Understand the core stages of the indigo dyeing process - Prepare and work with an indigo vat in a clear, guided way - Dye a symbolic garment or textile using mindful step-by-step techniques - Practice dipping, oxidation, rinsing, and layering colour with more confidence - Bring greater presence, intention, and sensory awareness into the act of dyeing - Experience indigo dyeing as a meditative and creative ritual - Create textiles or garments that carry personal meaning and ceremonial value I created this course to share indigo not only as a natural dye technique, but as a slower, more intuitive and meaningful way of creating. In many learning spaces, indigo is taught mainly as a technical process: how to make a vat, how to dip cloth, how to achieve colour. These practical foundations are essential, and they are included in the course, but my own experience of working with indigo has always been much deeper than technique alone. Indigo invites presence, patience, sensory awareness, and relationship with a living plant. I wanted to create a course that reflects this fuller experience and gives participants a way to approach indigo as both craft and embodied practice. What is unique about my approach is that it combines clear, step-by-step indigo vat making and dyeing instruction with somatic awareness, embodiment, ritual, and plant connection. In this course, participants do not simply learn how to achieve a beautiful blue colour. They are also invited to slow down, work with breath and full-body presence, and experience the scent, warmth, texture, and alchemical tra

courses.body: Many people begin noticing certain patterns: - Neck stiffness when turning the head - Shoulder tension that builds up during the day - Pain between the shoulder blades after sitting or working - Lower back tightness when standing up or bending - Hips and pelvis feel locked after sitting or driving - Heavy legs and slow blood flow by evening - Joint pain or cracking joints when moving - Morning stiffness that takes time to disappear These signs are often connected to fascia tension, limited flexibility, and reduced circulation in the muscles. Fascia is a connective tissue network supporting every muscle and joint. When it moves freely, the body feels light, flexible, and coordinated. Releasing myofascial tension helps restore flexibility, mobility, and healthy posture across the whole body. The movements inside Myo Fascial Play are designed to support your body in several ways. The practice helps to: - release deep myofascial tension - improve flexibility and joint mobility - support healthy blood and lymph flow - reduce joint pain and stiffness - restore natural posture and movement chains Many people notice that their body begins to feel lighter and easier to move even after the first few sessions. ### A Gentle Way to Support Long-Term Health For adults 40+, regular mobility and stretch practice help maintain healthy movement. Juliana is a 200-hour RYT (Yoga Alliance) trained with Micheline Berry, holds an additional 600 hours of yoga education, and has been deeply dedicated to Iyengar Yoga since 2019. courses.body: You will learn three key principles for improving blood circulation in the lower limbs and significantly enhance your quality of life through regular practice. Varicose vein disease responds remarkably well to adaptive yoga and breathing techniques. The first three modules cover three different techniques for working with varicose vein disease (VVD), while the fourth module offers practices that integrate all previously presented techniques. The traditional African dance movements also reduce stress and anxiety while improving the physical fitness of the body by strengthening and toning the muscles. Moreover, the intricate footwork and movements enhance coordination and balance the sense of which significantly changes during pregnancy and needs to be restored after birth. The African dance movements together with the yoga asanas are designed to boost your energy level and help you deepen your connection to your mind, your body and your emotions. We are going to explore a variety of dance movements and yoga poses, breathing techniques, and relaxation practices to unlock your inner peace and strength. This course contains three sections, and each section offers a sequence, a breathing technique and a relaxation practice for the first year after birth at gradually increasing difficulty levels. The first section contains practices for the postpartum period such as stretches, pelvic floor exercises, a breathing technique and a guided relaxation along with a traditional African healing dance sequence. In the second and the third section I invite you to join me in an easy or a medium level Afroyoga sequence. At the end of these sections I also guide you through a breathing technique and a relaxation. 8 video lessons Unlimited time access to all course materials

Step 3: Strengthen Your Core with Simple Movements Using easy-to-do core exercises, you’ll activate deep muscles to strengthen your core and balance your body. Step 4: Detox and Improve Wellness By the end of the course, you’ll feel lighter, more energized, and more in control of your health, with tools you can use daily to stay strong and healthy. Whether you’ve tried diets, fitness programs, or supplements that haven’t worked, this course addresses the root causes of belly fat and poor digestion. It’s designed to help you lose weight and improve your health, using techniques that are simple, effective, and sustainable. - No Special Equipment: Practice at home with just a yoga mat. - Holistic Approach: Improve digestion, core strength, and overall flexibility in one course. - Detox and Longevity: Use easy self-help techniques to detoxify your body and stay healthy for the long term. - Mi

courses.body: The Art of Sircle: Delve into the core principles and techniques of Sircle, designed to cultivate grace, mindfulness, and inner peace. Meditation in Motion: Integrate mindfulness techniques with movement to cultivate a deeper connection to your inner world. Stress Reduction & Self-Care: Learn how Sircle can help you manage stress, boost your mood, and create a sense of well-being. A Supportive Community: Connect with a welcoming online community of fellow Sircle dancers, sharing experiences and motivation. We are Sircle, we dance from the inside out, everything you feel comes out in your movement as you connect to each other and to the movements that unfold. Sircle Yoga Dance is an empowering movement meditation practice that will take you on a reflective journey of movement. It creates space for the body to awaken and embrace its power, using breath and meditation to create calm, even through the gradually intensifying movement. A Sircle practice will help you experience the extraordinary sensation of freedom in action, and freedom in repetition. It is an integrated practice that is open to all levels. It will simultaneously deepen your ability to meditate, increase your physical stamina and strength, and awaken your mind-body intelligence. Most dance in the wellness embodiment space is practiced as free form, but in India, Classical Dance is considered to be the highest form of Yoga, which is also why it is known as Shiva's dance. courses.title: The Body’s Wisdom - Somatic Practices for Emotional & Nervous System Regulation
courses.author: Desi Tess
courses.excerpt: Master the art of emotional wellbeing through a holistic approach that combines somatics, yoga, movement and breath, empowering you to build a resilient nervous system and fostering a profound connection with you body’s innate wisdom. Join me in “The Body’s Wisdom” and discover how to use your body
courses.body: Emotions are not just thoughts in our minds; they are deeply felt in our bodies. When we experience anger, fear, sadness, stress, or anxiety, these emotions create physiological responses that can become stored as tension, discomfort, or even chronic pain if not fully processed and released. This course is designed to help you connect with and release these emotions through the body, using somatic practices that support emotional regulation and overall well-being. What does “Somatic” mean? "Somatic" is a Greek word for "body." Somatic practices focus on the body’s sensations and movements to bring awareness and healing. In this course, we emphasise “bodyfulness”—the practice of being fully present in your body to understand and release what you are holding. By tuning into our bodies, we can regulate our nervous system, release stored emotions, and create a deeper sense of resilience and peace. What is Nervous System Regulation? Our nervous system plays a key role in how we experience and respond to emotions. When we are faced with intense feelings like fear, anger, or stress, our nervous system activates a “fight, flight, freeze or fawn” response to protect us. However, if this activation isn’t released, it can leave us feeling stuck, tense, or overwhelmed. This course uses movement, breathwork, and mindfulness techniques to help calm and regulate the nervous system, allowing emotions to be felt, processed, and released in a healthy way. Through these somatic practices, you will gain tools to: - Regulate your emotions and nervous system for greater mental and physical health. - Release stored tension and pain from your body. - Increase self-awareness, self-compassion, and inner strength. - Develop a deeper understanding of how your body holds and processes emotions. - Create a sustainable practice for emotional regulation and resilience. courses.title: Tea Meditation: Calm Your Mind And Unlock Your Full Potential
courses.author: Sergei Frolov
courses.excerpt: Carve out time for a comforting ritual — tea meditation that brings a sense of peace, joy and gratitude to your daily life. Decrease stress and anxiety, increase sense of calm and focus, and feel unbeatable every day. Don’t miss out and elevate your daily tea drinking ritual by incorporating mindful
courses.body: Some days, life can feel like one endless to-do list and non-stop stress. Long hours at work, emotional overwhelm and burnout often result in insomnia, depression and loss of self. You struggle to find a few moments to slow down and breathe. But the more you try, the less you achieve. It’s common and very real for many of us. It doesn’t need to be this tough. There’s a way to stop anxiety thoughts, stress and overwhelm, improve sleep and mental health. All you need to do is to find safe harbor, something stable you can rely on. This safe harbor can be a simple daily ritual that you enjoy all by yourself. A good example of such a ritual is tea meditation. This ancient practice is known to elevate everyday and help savor the moment. In addition to that, it is very simple. All you need is your favorite tea, a cup and you. If you’re ready, let’s start tea meditation! For this tea meditation, you’ll go about your normal routine in making your tea but add an extra layer of mindfulness and intention with each step. The process is the same, but your awareness is focused on the sensory experience of making and drinking your tea. STEP 1. Choose your tea. Consider your current mood and your mental and physical needs. Perhaps you opt for black tea for an energizing boost, or you’re looking for a calming herbal option to soothe your stress. Examine the intention behind your choice of tea and how you choose to prepare it. STEP 2. Select a cup with care. Choose a cup and a teapot that resonates with you. It could be something you found at the shop, a thoughtful gift from a friend, or a unique piece crafted by a local artisan. Select a cup and a teapot that brings you joy and comfort. STEP 3. Notice the water boiling. While you’re waiting for the water to boil, find a comfortable position and begin to deepen your breath. As you breathe deeply, notice the sound of the water as it begins to boil. Enjoy the slowness of this process. STEP 4. Watch the tea transition. Carefully pour the

Probably for the first time in your life… You will learn how to breathe, how to move, how to be comfortable with discomfort, and learn so much more about yourself. The course consists of about 20 short videos of several minutes each, 7 audio, and about 30 pages of texts with additional knowledge and explanations. In the T.R.U.S.T. program, you will learn how to calm your body and your mind and be more relaxed whatever the situation or context you are facing. You will gradually become more prepared for the unexpected. You will improve your ability to deal with increasingly stressful situations while preserving your well-being. In this program, you will learn a complete method to gradually help you get rid of unnecessary stress and make you more resilient to face upcoming challenges. The three pillars of the T.R.U.S.T. method are: Step 1: STRESS IDENTIFICATION Learn how to feel and identify stress in your body in the very beginning and start to work with it right away. The more you know yourself the easier it will become. courses.title: Mana Movement Maternity: Flow Through Pregnancy & Birth With Pleasure
courses.author: Mana Mei
courses.excerpt: Mama, you deserve a pleasure-filled, peaceful and easeful birth experience. This course is created to help pregnant mamas to flow through pregnancy and birth with pleasure, ease and comfort. It’s a simple yet powerful daily practice that will help you become more radiant, alive, relaxed and glowing.
courses.body: The journey of pregnancy and birth is an incredible rite of passage for every woman. It’s not just about morning sickness, backaches, and swelling. Your body is changing, and it may even feel like it doesn’t belong to you anymore. You struggle with mood swings and mama brain, feel anxious, vulnerable and overwhelmed as your due day is approaching. But did you know that you as a woman have the power to transform your pregnancy and birth experience? You can fill it with immense pleasure, ease, comfort, and deep connection with your baby. Every woman has this innate power within and can be in control of the whole experience. It doesn’t matter if it’s your first experience of being a mama or not. The secret is in feminine movement pathways - spirals, circles and waves - that activate this powerful feminine energy within. courses.body: - Cultivates vocal capabilities through structured exercises and techniques. - Deepens understanding of sound's impact on body and mind. - Develops vocal dexterity, pitch accuracy, and breath control. - Lays a solid foundation for expressive singing through practice of ornamentations (alankaras), scales, and vocal exercises. - Enhances spiritual connectivity through chanting shlokas, mantras, and devotional songs. - Fosters a sense of reverence towards sound. - Nurtures musical proficiency. - Promotes personal growth by instilling qualities like discipline, patience, and dedication. - Provides a profound appreciation for the transformative power of sound and music in life. - Be able to practice on one's own and experiment to sing different melodies. Nada yoga is based on the premise that the entire cosmos and everything in it (including humans) consist of sound vibrations or nadas. Nada yoga uses sound vibrations and resonances to treat various spiritual and psychological conditions. It also helps increase one's awareness of the chakras and energizes them. When we access sound from this consciousness and land on practical exercises to activate the voice, the results surpass just the peripheral expectation of singing well. courses.title: Brain Biohacking — Focus. Memory. Think faster.
courses.author: Victoria Zimenkova
courses.excerpt: Tired of feeling stressed or your brain not working at full capacity? Increase the activity of your brain with 60 simple exercises and get it working as it should. Train your brain so that it works better and faster. Improve your memory, concentration, problem-solving.
courses.body: If so, Brain Biohacking is the course for you. This course is for those who want to: - Keep the mind sharp and young. - Have a perfect memory. - Make it easy to learn languages, and memorize a large amount of information. - Avoid age-related diseases such as Alzheimer's or Parkinson's disease. - Freely memorize dates, phone numbers, numbers, and important events. - Be cheerful and energetic, increase your efficiency. It's not just a simple process of reawakening. Your brain has been resting, and now it needs to get back to work. It needs energy. The good news is that mitochondria are always ready to help. But over time, they can become damaged by various factors, which lead to their quality deteriorating and their number decreasing by 2 times after 30 years of age. As a result, the brain does not receive enough energy — and so we get up in the morning feeling tired and exhausted. We reach for sweets and coffee instead of breakfast because we need more energy—and these foods give us more energy only temporarily. We have trouble remembering things or concentrating on something new; our memory deteriorates; and when we're tired we forget even more often than usual. This is why people start snapping at their relatives and subordinates at work: they're just tired! They feel squeezed out like lemons every day because they don't have enough energy stored up in their cells (mitochondria) to help them do everything they need to do throughout the day! But there is a solution: Brain Biohacking! Victoria has developed a unique technique for pumping the brain, including neurohymnastics, mnemonics to increase memory, exercises for the development of mental abilities, and theoretical information. She will show you how to use simple techniques to: - Make your mind more tenacious. - React faster, solve problems, and make decisions. - Memorize and assimilate new information faster. - Be more concentrated and diligent, understand the essence of what you read at once, and not re-read i

Dive into this adventure with Dina Stepina, your guide to the world of intuitive dance, backed by her handpicked tunes, and get ready to feel the unique vibe of intuitive dance. “Feel Your Body!” includes 8 amazing modules that will unlock all secrets of intuitive movement - everything from chilling your body out, getting in sync with it, to the dance itself, and how to wrap it all up. You’ll get access to 16 dance class videos with step-by-step instructions. Additionally, 6 audio recordings featuring the author's voice guidance so that you could enjoy dancing on your own. - Reset your body and mind through intuitive movement - Learn 9 intuitive movement principles that will inspire you to dance - Learn to feel the impulses and desires of your body - Remove fatigue and tension from your body in a safe way - Boost our energy without any medications or caffeine - Explore new ways of movement and fall in love with your body By the end of the course, you'll totally get what works fo

courses.title: Luscious Belly Dance Technique For Beginners
courses.author: Alisa Shine
courses.excerpt: In this online course for beginners Alisa Shine, an international belly dance artist and instructor will break down the basic of belly dance in an easy yet fun way. After learning basic moves you will have a chance to practice combinations to let all you have learned settle in your body.
courses.body: This course focuses of the very basic moves of belly dance and consists of three parts: - Safety & posture, a warmup, and upper body work (including the belly) - Hip work (lower body work) - Belly dance combinations All the belly dance moves can be divided in three categories: staccato-like moves (pops & locks), flowing moves (circles, rolls etc.) and shimmies. We are going to work with all these types of moves, so be patient and repeat the moves as many times as you need until it sinks into your body. The main Arabic rhythm we are going to use during this course is baladi (masmoudi saghir). You will hear it in most of the training videos. I have been teaching and performing belly dance around the world for over 12 years (Europe, Asia, Australia) and feel very passionate about passing the love for the dance to others. My students are generally women (and sometimes man) of all ages (the most senior student is 82!) so safety is my main priority. My goal is to teach you to gain a better control over your body, to loosen up tight chest and hip area, to help you discover hidden abilities of your body through belly dance! The course for beginners, who wants to learn basics of belly dance, tone and loosen up a tight body, improve flexibility, plasticity and boost self-esteem! 33 video lessons Unlimited time access to all course materials

courses.title: Through Belly Dance And Mindful Movement
courses.author: Alisa Shine
courses.excerpt: In this course Alisa Shine, international belly dance & fitness instructor with over 15 years of working with women of all ages and backgrounds, will share holistic techniques to achieve ultimate women's health.
courses.body: - To improve the overall women’s health - To deepen the connection to the body through the mind-body work - To increase flexibility of major joints through dance & stretching - To practice of abdominal breathing, optimization of the breathing process during dance practice - To release the stiffness of shoulder and lower back areas - To strengthen the pelvic floor muscles - To learn self-massage and roll stretch techniques for a deeper relaxation and a better night Women’s health is crucial! It’s important to take small daily steps towards inner harmony and physical health. Women are the center of the Universe, we are the inspiration, the beauty of the world, we are the bearers of life! These techniques help develop posture alignment, flexibility, body control; loosen up tight upper and lower back areas. Belly dance existed in different forms for thousands of years. It takes its origins in ancient Egyptian land. The dance has accompanied major life events of people from birthdays to funerals. It has been the most primal expression of life, a tool to connect to the body & the world around and live through the various emotions with ease. There are undeniable health benefits of belly dance for women. Firstly, this dance style works for all ages (my most senior student was 82!). It has a low impact on joints. Secondly, the dance includes isolated movements of different parts of the body which improves lymphatic flow in each area from top to toe. Mind-body connection is truly powerful! I always say dance can be a dynamic meditation. We will be learning to connect the flowing, staccato and shimmy-like movements with breathing and the music at the same time. It’s a whole body experience. You will find it’s nearly impossible to think of anything else while you are dancing, so it helps to clear the head too! I have taught belly dance around the globe and I firmly believe that the value of it for women’s health is enormous. All that is learned in the class is applicable to eve

The classes of this course will become your morning and evening routines. courses.body: In the online course you get a complex of exercises for the face and neck, with the help of which the face comes to a normal tone, fine lines, nasolabial lips, inter-row, and black circles under the eyes go away, and the face oval is tightened, puffiness goes away and this is not the whole list of changes. You can work out wherever and whenever you want. You need a computer, laptop, or smartphone with internet access. There are two videos for each exercise: Detailed analysis of the exercise together with the model: you look carefully at the model and listen to me: what starting position to take, how to put your hands correctly, and what happens to your face at this time. First, you should watch the videos to understand the technique. Cheat sheet: here you look at me and repeat the exercise after me. If you don't understand something, go back to the first video. When you have learned enough of the exercises in the course, you can switch off the breakdown video. In this way, you study all the exercises in detail, significantly reduce the number of possible mistakes, and get your first result in 7 days. It is important to do the exercises every day! 5 video lessons Unlimited time access to all course materials

courses.excerpt: In this online course Natalia Kolesnik, tantra facilitator, yoga teacher and energy coach will guide you through the self love journey, where you will learn who you really are and how to implement self love habits on a daily basis.
courses.body: Still struggling with accepting yourself as you are and feeling like you're living someone else’s life? The journey of revealing your true potential and life ‘s purpose starts with learning how to really love yourself! Finally, break through this wall of endless self criticism and start to enjoy yourself fully and unconditionally! You may think, why I need the self love and how any course can even help me to solve all my problems? It makes sense, but here is my story. I've been more than 4 years seeking how I can become a great person with stable self esteem and clarity about my purpose. I quit my job which I didn't love and went to Bali to find who I really am. I was trying a dozen of retreats, psychologists, healing masters and practices, personality unpacking things, tantra, several Vipassana, yoga and meditation. I went through ups and downs, and sometimes it was not easy at all and I already wanted to give it up and get back to a stability and boring reality which I've known before. But I didn't. And now I'm here. Willing and ready to help and inspire you to be strong and show that you can live a life of your dreams full of joy and sacred love feeling to yourself. Things started dramatically change as soon as I forgave myself and started to be more delicate and attentive towards my feelings. I can express myself as Ive never thought before, creativity is bursting out of me and I started to attract really cool people with whom we have the soul connection and walking one path. Im living a live which I created by myself. And so can you. I believe that every person in this planet is a seed, which can grow into a magnificent flower. If you are nourishing it rightfully. With everyday self care and love. And Im here to give you my best and precious tools how to learn it, which has helped me and I'm sure will help you as well. See you in the other side, in life, which starts with the smile as first thing you do when you wake up! - You are struggling with self expressio

courses.body: In this special course, you'll embark on a pleasant journey to rediscover and activate your libido, energy levels, and irresistible magnetism on a daily basis. courses.title: Pilates for your beautiful shape and health
courses.author: Tatiana Saxon
courses.excerpt:
This course is designed to get you in shape quickly and activate the deep abdominal muscles: pelvic floor, transverse muscle and oblique abdominal muscles. This course is also designed to relax the respiratory diaphragm and return your body to deep and calm breathing.
The result of regular training
courses.body: - get in shape quickly - tighten the abdominal and buttock muscles - deepen the breath - boost vitality - square the shoulders and strengthen the back muscles On this course I have combined classical Pilates exercises and a special breathing technique, thanks to which you will not only make your body strong and flexible, but also relax your breathing muscles and work very well the deep muscles of the abdomen and buttocks. I am a body therapist, psychologist, sexologist and certified trainer of the international Pilates school "Pilates Polestar" and all my practice has been searching for the most effective methods of working with the consequences of stress in the body. On the course you will learn what is correct physiological breathing and you will be able to regain a healthy breathing pattern, release the effects of stress in the body in the form of chronic tension of the diaphragm and the pelvic floor. The elasticity of the respiratory diaphragm determines the state of the deep abdominal muscles: the pelvic floor, transverse abdominal muscles and small muscles that hold the spine. By restoring healthy physiological breathing we affect areas such as: - pelvic organs health; - cope with swelling; - good digestion; - vitality; - ability to cope with stress; - spinal health, pelvic health; - brain function. The programme is designed in such a way that you can do 10-12 minutes daily and gradually increase the difficulty. Regular exercise and a healthy diet will also activate fat burning. We all want to have a good trim figure, but often we either lack time, discipline or simply don't know how to do it. If you notice that you're pumping your abs but your stomach remains weak and bulging, there are two possible reasons: either you're overeating or your deep abdominal muscles aren't working. They have accumulated vast experience in treatment. Imitating the sounds of nature - animals, birds, wind and so on, they entered a trance state, which opened the reserves of their psyche and opened the door to the world of spirits or subtle feelings. This is how the art of throat or overtone singing was formed. courses.body: Does your body ache after sitting all day? Many of us spend hours sitting in a car, on public transport, by the desk at work, by the dining table during lunch or dinner. Is too much sitting harmful for your body? Definitely, YES! Sitting down for too long can have several negative side effects on your body. Without movement, your muscles become tight, your joints become stiff, and your metabolism and circulation slow down. These changes can result in chronic pain and a variety of different conditions that can continue to get worse the more you sit. Good news is that all these side effects can be easily eliminated with a doctor-approved complex of exercises. Developed by a spinal therapist with over 8 years of experience, this simple and super effective seated mobility routine will help you remove all symptoms of prolonged sitting in just a few minutes. No equipment needed — you can do it in the office, in your car or simply by the desk. Just watch, follow the guidelines, and enjoy instant relief from all the discomfort. STEP 1. We’ll start from seated mobility exercises for the upper body. You’ll feel how simple movements explained by the doctor remove tightness and stiffness from your neck and shoulders. Plus, boost brain function, memory and clear thinking. STEP 2. Continue with a set of exercises for your spine. Unlock your lower back gently and safely, remove pain and tightness from your lower back and improve blood flow to all parts of the body. STEP 3. Next, give attention to your chest and belly, get your cardiovascular system going and boost metabolism. STEP 4. Finally, engage in exercises designed to eliminate joint stiffness. Feel more comfortable typing or writing and protect your joints from the risk of developing osteoarthritis. 24 video lessons Unlimited time access to all course materials These 24 doctor-approved spinal exercises are your life-saver. courses.body: - Enjoy their own voice - Learn to love and accept themselves with sound healing - Make their voice more velvety, languid, and sensual - Express emotions and states through vocal practice - Heal their emotional and psychological state through singing - Begin to sing in their own unique and distinctive manner The voice is the most powerful resource for self-expression. It can both endear us to others and repel them. It can be a tool to influence other people, it can convey our feelings and emotions, it can be a magnet for the opposite sex, our calling card. Or, on the contrary, it can show our insecurities, complexes, and fears. "I want people to enjoy their voice, to reveal their feelings and emotions, not to be afraid to express themselves, to share their experiences with the world through music. Music has had a therapeutic effect for centuries. Our grandparents sang in front of their homes, living out the power of their sound and their emotions. When we sing with our whole soul and our whole body, without stopping the flow that pours out of us, it gives a sense of cleansing, a feeling of fullness, a release from accumulated heaviness, a state of joy. In this course, Nia gives practical tools for working through the voice to start singing and sounding beautifully, techniques for discovering individual vocal data, ways to make your voice more confident and appealing. courses.body: - Develop musical skills, creativity and expression - Have great coordination - Train their attention and concentration - Get a cool system to develop musical timing and preciseness of their performance - Learn unique rhythmic patterns - Be an improviser but don't know how to get there - Have fun with their friends - Have a good time with their children and develop their skills Konnakol is an ancient Indian system for developing a perfect sense of rhythm. In Konnakol, the instrument for learning rhythm is the voice, with which special syllables are pronounced. This gives you the opportunity to sound distinctive and deep, to maximize your inner world through sound. The advantage of this musical practice is that it is versatile and very easy, it does not require special talents or additional instruments. People of all ages and even children can practice it. Also, with the help of Konnakol new neural connections are actively formed in the brain, which helps to improve memory, concentration, and attention. Stress and anxiety levels decrease and mood improves. The teacher, Alex Ostapenko, is a great fan of Konnakol. To learn these arts he traveled to India, Brazil, Peru, Spain, Germany, France, Italy and Greece. He was participating and teaching and the most respected festivals of body music. He has gathered all his knowledge in this course and is happy to share it. All you need to learn is 5-10 minutes of free time and a willingness to have a new, magical musical experience. To deepen the understanding of rhythm, the author included exercises on corpus percussion in the course. To learn konnakol ideas and then reproduce them on your body. It's fun, it's freedom and self-expression. To understand much better how to apply konnakol to other musical instruments. If you like the approach of Alex and Vlada to teaching and you want to go deeper into the world of Creativity, Musicality and Rhythm, please visit their social-media: https://instagram.com/rhythmiccouple https://www

courses.title: Neuro Therapy: Simple Movement for a Sharper Mind
courses.author: Victoria Zimenkova
courses.excerpt:
Feel foggy, struggle to focus, or out of touch with your body?
Whether it’s brain aging, mental fatigue, or ADHD symptoms — your brain just needs a reset. Gently wake up your brain and body with slow, simple movements. No strain, no overwhelm — just 10 minutes to bring back clarity, ease, and flow.
courses.body: If your mind feels foggy, your focus drifts, or your body feels unsteady — it’s not just fatigue. These are early signs of brain aging. Restore clarity with gentle movement. Neuro Therapy is a science-backed method that uses simple movement to keep your brain sharp and your body steady. With just 10 minutes a day, you’ll: ✅ Stimulate both brain hemispheres & restore clarity ✅ Ease back, neck, and joint pain through gentle motion ✅ Reduce brain fog and ease ADHD symptoms ✅ Improve balance, memory, and quick thinking ✅ Feel more energized, calm, and mentally steady ✅ Support long-term brain health without strain You don’t need hard workouts or boring brain games. Just quiet, mindful movement — and the results speak for themselves. Neuro Therapy is designed to be gentle, simple, and deeply effective. Through slow, guided movement, it activates your brain, relaxes your body, and clears mental fog — without strain, confusion, or pressure. No intense workouts. No complex routines. Just calm, coordinated motion that helps you feel sharper, steadier, and more balanced from within — in just 10 minutes a day. ✅ Step 1: Wake Up Your Brain Discover how slow, asynchronous movements stimulate neural pathways, activate both brain hemispheres, and gently reverse signs of brain aging. Feel the fog lift — and recharge your mind. ✅ Step 2: Clear Brain Fog & Sharpen Focus Practice targeted movements in circles and figure-eights that enhance focus, reduce forgetfulness, and help you feel more mentally steady — in just 10 minutes, 2-3 times a week. ✅ Step 3: Strengthen & Protect Your Body Learn how specific movement patterns can relieve back, neck, and joint pain, improve balance, and slow down physical aging, keeping your body steady and flexible for years to come. ✅ Step 4: Stay Sharp, Energized & Confidently Active End the course with powerful daily exercises that keep your brain sharp, reduce stress, and boost energy - so you can wake up feeling refreshed, stay pain-free. and thrive

courses.excerpt: Powerful practices for healing through your own voice and sound. It is useful both for emotional and physical state. courses.body: - Helps to release tension through sound. - It shows how to love your own voice and feel the power of speech. - Shows the way to express yourself more freely by harnessing the energetic signature of each mantra. - Gives methods on how to transform negative emotions into positive ones. - Explaining how to switch attention from the outside world inside of you to calm down in overwhelming and stressful moments. - Allows feeling of peace and joy inside by using a unique hypnotic tune of mantras. - Helps to get rid of constant stress: experience the chakras and their resonance in the body. - Gives tools to be concentrated and focused on demand, and opposite, drop into a meditative state if such needed. - You also can discover creativity and inner potential that can be applied in daily life. - Finally, you will be on a journey of finding a deep, beautiful and enchanting voice. This course is a way to develop and use your voice as a tool to get to know yourself and your inner world, to begin to manifest freely and openly in the world through singing. Lessons of the course are simple and straightforward. They are aimed at getting rid of fears, inner limitations, and complexes through vocal therapy and mantra chanting. And also they are helping to find connection with oneself through the voice and the sound: tune into the desired emotional and energetic state. The peculiarity of this course is that one learns not only to sing mantras beautifully and confidently but also to heal oneself, one's physical and psychological state by chanting certain sounds of mantras. It is a very versatile method suitable for absolutely everyone at any age, especially relevant in today's world with its high levels of stress. This course will remove the fears of NOT knowing sanscrit for chanting mantras as Mayoori carefully guides you through on every step. Mayoori designed this course in such a way that people of any age, with any level of expertise or exposure to Mantras can easily follow and a

courses.title: Dancehall: fiery dances for women
courses.author: Marina Pautova
courses.excerpt: A program of dance training, aimed at revealing femininity, developing plasticity, self-confidence and the ability to beautifully dance and control your body. The author of the course is a choreographer with 15 years of experience, who has taught hundreds of girls to dance.
courses.body: - Learn how to dance beautifully with any music. - Become more flexible and graceful. - Learn a new dance style for women. - Be slim and trim. - Learn how to move your hips effectively, to dance the twerk. - Spend your free time with benefit for your body and mind. - Be more feminine and attractive. - Loosen up, to remove stress and inner blocks. - Enjoy physical activity which will keep them in shape without having to go to the gym. - Learn to control their body, to accept it and love it. In this course, choreographer Marina Pautova has collected the basic knowledge and movements of the dance direction "Female dancehall". The main emphasis is on the rotation of the hips and the ability to move freely, fiery and gracefully. The course is suitable for beginners and for those who already have dancing experience. It does not require special training and has no age restrictions. Each choreography is explained as detailed as possible, so even those who have never danced before can begin to control their bodies. Female dancehall is not only a beautiful and energetic, positive dance, but also a great workout for all muscle groups. It will make your buttocks taut and firm, it will help to be in great fit, eliminate clips, blocks and stagnation in the pelvis. Most importantly – it will teach you how to dance without leaving home, with pleasure, with self-love, without shyness and tightness. 6 video lessons Access the course on your phone, tablet or computer Unlimited time access to all course materials

courses.title: Dance therapy
courses.author: Yulia Demina
courses.excerpt: An online course on how to learn to dance beautifully and master your body, work through stress, internal blocks, and how to heal your psychological state through movement. The author of the course is an international class coach with 15 years of experience, a choreographer, professional dancer and
courses.body: - Learn to dance in different styles, to feel their body. - Develop flexibility and plasticity, to be healthy and agile. - Work through inner fears, blocks and problems with dance. - Relieve stress and psychological tension, reload with the help of movement. - Release inner resentments, negative emotions, dissatisfactions without accumulating them inside. - Become more confident, not to be ashamed of their body, to feel easy and free on the dance floor. - Understand their needs and desires, to unlock their potential. In this course dance acts not only as a way to strengthen and improve physical health, flexibility and mobility of the body, but also as a therapeutic practice, aimed at solving emotional and psychological problems of the person, the release of negative emotions through movement. Julia, an experienced dancer with 25 years of experience, will show in the video lessons a variety of styles, providing 6 ready-made staged dances and break down the choreography of their performance step by step. The course will teach even those who think they can't dance methods to control their bodies and move easily and gracefully, without constraint or stiffness whilst enjoying the process. The classes also include practices and meditations aimed at eliminating inner conflicts, stress, difficulties in various spheres of life and gaining harmony as well as the ability to cope with negative states. The programme is meant for beginners who want to learn how to dance, for advanced dancers as well as for experienced psychologists in order to introduce this kind of therapy into their work. The video lessons are very detailed, so it is easy to learn the choreography together with a trainer as well as to dance independently, improvising and adding new elements to the existing routines. 30 video lessons with a total duration of 90 minutes Unlimited time access to all course materials. [Additional course materials](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1DtvgaCMDe7yP75wEoKukJbZJ6z8n

courses.title: Dance Therapy 2.0
courses.author: Yulia Demina
courses.excerpt: Dance lessons for beginners from a choreographer with 25 years of experience to help you to loosen up, master your body and move beautifully. Lessons to eliminate complexes and stress, psychological and physical blocks, exercises to work through negative emotional states through dance and movement.
courses.body: - Develop their attractiveness and grace. - To discover their inner world through movement and express themselves. - Easily deal with resentment and/or insecurity. - To be in shape and to enjoy physical activity, dancing instead of spending countless hours in the gym. - Surprise those close to you with your dancing skills. - To feel free and easy on the dance floor. - To learn to improvise, not to dance according to a premeditated script, but by dictation of body and soul. All of our repressed feelings, emotions, resentments and negative states do not go away, they remain in the body. These clamps and blocks can cause psychosomatic illness. This is why it is important to work through them, let them go and work through them slowly. Julia is a certified psychologist and professional dancer, she has collected powerful practices in this course that are not only aimed at the study of dancing styles and choreography but also on the deep psychological work of moving to music. Each dance presented in the lessons is chosen to work on a particular emotional state and life situation thus movement becomes a tool for internal and external changes. The author will show how to dance so that you can get rid of negative beliefs and programs, how to develop self-confidence, how to reach a new energy level, how to learn to forgive, how to solve material issues, and most importantly - how to love and accept ourselves, to understand our value. Added to all of this is a bonus of feeling good, joy about yourself and a toned body. The course has no physical or age restrictions. No additional skills or knowledge required. - Different styles of dancing. - Developing elasticity and flexibility. - Not being ashamed of your body, rather to embrace and love it. - To feel the music, to free oneself and relax in dance. - Coping with anxiety through body, meditative and dance practices. - Freeing oneself from stiffness in the body. - Discovering your inner potential. 27 video lessons with a total d

courses.title: Chinese acupressure back massage
courses.author: Lyudmila Kosareva
courses.excerpt: Chinese acupressure techniques aimed at relieving upper back and lower back pain, releasing clamps and tension and to provide the patient with relaxation. The author of the course is a certified body therapist and massage therapist with experience in South Korea.
courses.body: - Eliminate headaches and migraines without medication. - Learn self-massaging techniques. - Learn how to relax spasmodic facial muscles to maintain a youthful and fresh appearance. - Learn wellness techniques of Chinese massage to relieve back pain, stiffness and muscle tightness in yourself and in your loved ones. - Learn how to relax and relieve emotional and physical tension in your partner. - Influence one's emotional and physical well-being through body practices. - Techniques for working with biologically manipulable points of the body. - Principles and techniques of relaxation for wellness massaging of the back. - Facial acupressure massage for relieving headaches, migraines and muscle spasms. - Massage practices to relieve stress, body stiffness and tightness. The course contains Chinese acupressure techniques designed to safely work the muscles of the back, activate the body's energy centres, maximise physical and psychological relaxation and to relieve ongoing fatigue and pain. The video lessons include theoretical information on how to work each muscle group, plus information about what continuous tension in the body can lead to and what positive changes occur when we work on biologically active points. During the practical sessions Ludmila demonstrates in detail the correct massage technique along with where to find and how to act on acupuncture points, how to position your hands and much more. The time required for a full back massage is 20 minutes. The lessons are suitable for beginners as well as for those who practice massage professionally and wish to deepen their knowledge. As a bonus to the basic material, a video is available with a self-pointed facial massage to relieve headaches, stress and to reduce the intensity and frequency of muscle spasms. This will have a beneficial effect on the skin, facial ovality and its youthfulness and freshness. 7 video lessons Unlimited time access to all course materials

courses.title: Bodyweight workouts
courses.author: Felix Harder
courses.excerpt: Intelligible lessons on how to gain muscle and get lean by using training program focused on home workout and bodyweight.
courses.body: Beginners seeking to get a workout that is proven by science and made to gain muscles and get leaner - How to gain muscle and become leaner using only weight of own body. - Absorb the knowledge of succeeding on the great body shape and effective nutrition plan. - Learn on how to workout with a flawless form with provided video lessons. - Understanding how to set your correct individual goals. I am Felix Harder and I am a certified coach and author. Over the years I've worked with and coached thousands of students from every corner of the planet. My program Build Muscle Without a gym is developed for those who are determined to get in a great shape and gain muscles without going to the gym. You don't need special equipment – your body is your tool. Bodyweight exercises allow you to workout wherever you are. All you need is you! In addition to best workout lessons you will be provided with knowledge I have learned over the years. I will explain to you how to make an effective diet plan, will advice you on how to make the best workout plan if you are beginner and what your goals should be to get best results. Another important aspect we will talk about is myth and prejudices about bodybuilding and gaining muscles. You will need to shake off such clichés as "Do this exercise 5 times a day and…" and others. You will learn to apply rational approach with given tools for your own body goals. Program topics: - Step-by-step muscle building guidance - Step-by-step calorie burn guidance for lean body - Guidance on using your own bodyweight for bodybuilding - Video guide for perfect form training - Lessons about nutrition plan and dieting - My ebook "Bodyweight basics" with extra 44 bodyweight exercises with pictures - Inspirational lessons for you to setting and reaching goals in bodybuilding 26 video lessons Access the course on your phone, tablet or computer Unlimited time access to all course materials

courses.title: A Beautiful Body at Home
courses.author: Zaboeva Yulia
courses.excerpt: A program of 30-minute home workouts. You will no longer waste hours of your life on gym and running sessions. Yulia Zaboeva is a fitness trainer with 5 years of teaching experience, she will show you how to burn maximum calories with pleasure in a minimum time. Eliminating the consequences of an ex
courses.body: - To be thin, light, and with taut and glowing skin. - To eat your favorite foods without gaining weight. - Prepare your body for the summer, and impress everyone with a new bikini. - To balance out your weight while building muscles. - Enjoy your body and admire your reflection in the mirror. - Speed up your metabolism and increase your calorie-burning process. - To get the most out of home training. - Be slim at any age. - Exercise with your own weight to work out all muscle groups. - Quickly lose extra pounds by combining exercises with an enjoyable diet. - Tighten your thighs, buttocks, abs, and arms. - Become more energetic. - Correct weight with a scientific approach, without losing muscles. - Improve your well-being, mood, and overall body tone. The training program is designed to replace boring cardio and heavy dumbbells. It is suitable for those who want to get a beautiful body in a short time. HIIT-style workouts are aimed at burning the maximum number of calories in less time so that you don't have to spend precious hours of your life on sports and diets while staying in great shape. This type of exercise allows you to effectively work out the most difficult parts of the body without losing muscle mass and gaining a beautiful relief. But the main feature of these exercises is that energy is expended intensively even after classes, as long as the metabolism is accelerated. The course includes 15 different complexes and a bonus workout for the flexibility and relaxation of all muscles. The duration of each is 25-30 minutes. These workouts include general exercises for the whole body as well as exercises on specific areas for firm and rounded buttocks, strengthening pectoral muscles, shaping a shapely waist, and working out the inner thighs. Workouts have no age or physical restrictions. No additional equipment is required. 16 video lessons Unlimited time access to all course materials

courses.title: Art Therapy: Rewire Your Brain, Calm Your Mind & Heal
courses.author: Alena Shain
courses.excerpt: Stressed out? Feeling foggy or stuck? When your mind’s overwhelmed—whether from stress, scattered thoughts, or old emotional baggage—life gets harder than it needs to be. Art Therapy rewires your brain, calms your stress, and heals your mind with simple, science-backed techniques anyone can do. Star
courses.body: Struggling with stress? Feeling anxious, overwhelmed, or haunted by past trauma? Finding it harder to think straight? Drained by mental chaos every day? If you don’t act now, your calm, clarity, and confidence will slip away over time. Does This Sound Familiar? - You feel trapped by stress and can’t quiet your mind. - Old wounds and worries steal your focus and peace. - You’re exhausted from overthinking and emotional weight. - You want relief, sharper thoughts, and a calmer spirit. - You need an easy way to heal and reclaim your mind. This Art Therapy course gives you proven techniques that rewire your brain, melt stress, and heal trauma — so you can feel lighter, think clearer, and rediscover yourself with every stroke. No skills needed — just follow along and feel the shift in minutes. Every day you wait, your mind suffers more. Start now and take back control! This Art Therapy course isn’t another mindfulness app or vague promise—it’s a science-backed method that rewires your brain, calms your stress, and heals your mind through simple, creative exercises anyone can do. Step 1: Rewire Your Brain with Simple Art Strokes See how drawing and movement fire up your brain’s wiring to boost focus, sharpen memory, and lift mental fog—fast. Step 2: Calm Your Stress with Every Brushstroke Practice easy art techniques that melt daily stress and quiet overthinking, bringing you peace in just minutes. Step 3: Heal Trauma Through Creative Release Use guided drawing to process old wounds and emotional weight, leaving you lighter and stronger. Step 4: Spark Creativity and Mental Clarity Tap into both sides of your brain with fun, no-skill-needed exercises that ignite creativity and help you think clearer. Step 5: Keep Your Mind Young and Strong Learn how to prevent brain aging, fight cognitive decline, and stay mentally sharp with habits that last. Feel the shift in your daily life—calmer thoughts, better focus, and healed energy. Join Today! If you’ve tried meditation apps, br

courses.title: Brain Biohacking — Focus. Memory. Think faster.
courses.author: Victoria Zimenkova
courses.excerpt: Tired of feeling stressed or your brain not working at full capacity? Increase the activity of your brain with 60 simple exercises and get it working as it should. Train your brain so that it works better and faster. Improve your memory, concentration, problem-solving.
courses.body: If so, Brain Biohacking is the course for you. This course is for those who want to: - Keep the mind sharp and young. - Have a perfect memory. - Make it easy to learn languages, and memorize a large amount of information. - Avoid age-related diseases such as Alzheimer's or Parkinson's disease. - Freely memorize dates, phone numbers, numbers, and important events. - Be cheerful and energetic, increase your efficiency. It's not just a simple process of reawakening. Your brain has been resting, and now it needs to get back to work. It needs energy. The good news is that mitochondria are always ready to help. But over time, they can become damaged by various factors, which lead to their quality deteriorating and their number decreasing by 2 times after 30 years of age. As a result, the brain does not receive enough energy — and so we get up in the morning feeling tired and exhausted. We reach for sweets and coffee instead of breakfast because we need more energy—and these foods give us more energy only temporarily. We have trouble remembering things or concentrating on something new; our memory deteriorates; and when we're tired we forget even more often than usual. This is why people start snapping at their relatives and subordinates at work: they're just tired! They feel squeezed out like lemons every day because they don't have enough energy stored up in their cells (mitochondria) to help them do everything they need to do throughout the day! But there is a solution: Brain Biohacking! Victoria has developed a unique technique for pumping the brain, including neurohymnastics, mnemonics to increase memory, exercises for the development of mental abilities, and theoretical information. She will show you how to use simple techniques to: - Make your mind more tenacious. - React faster, solve problems, and make decisions. - Memorize and assimilate new information faster. - Be more concentrated and diligent, understand the essence of what you read at once, and not re-read i
